questions.question: Would you agree with this sentiment? "I'm always burned out."
When meeting new people or chasing new experiences, do you sometimes dread the whole thing turning out to be a disappointment?
Would you agree with this sentiment? "There are many times where people are slow to catch on to my thought process."
options: Slightly agree - it's not enough times for me to notice

questions.question: Would you agree with this sentiment? "People generally know my tastes and sensibilities if they were to get me a gift."
Imagine you are running a market stall in the Human Village and selling a bunch of random trinkets. If Aya were to come by for a report, would you be able to make the case for your wares?
options: Yes, I can. Every one of them

questions.question: Would you agree with this sentiment? "I'm told a good number of times by someone that something reminded them of me (or something along those lines)."
Have you ever looked back upon an action you took and thought to yoursel, "My, that was pretty on-brand of me"?
